title: Reader-fit rubric (rubric.yml)
description: A weighted scoring rubric DERIVED from a reader model's need-state. Each test is byte-compatible with a nitpicker scored-test definition, so the audience studio scores against the nitpicker engine (nit aggregate) with no duplicate scoring math. Critical needs become gates.

rubric.description: Matches the audience slug it scores for.

derived_from.description: Provenance — the model file this rubric was derived from (regenerate when it changes).

gates.description: Test slugs (critical needs) that can unilaterally fail the work, per the review policy's fail_floor_ratio.

tests.description: Each test scores one need. Same shape as a nitpicker scored-test (configs/tests/*.yaml).

test.description: Test slug — usually the need id it scores.

dimension.description: Use `reader-fit` so the whole rubric rolls into one comparable dimension.
